scripts.format:check: stylua --check --output-format summary src tests plugin examples
scripts.lint:selene: node tools/run-selene.js src examples plugin tests
scripts.generate:examples: node tools/luau-contract.js generate all --contract-module "examples/*.contract.lua" --out generated/remotes --tests-out generated/tests --sdk-require "../../src/Contracts"
scripts.verify:examples: node tools/luau-contract.js verify remotes --contract-module "examples/*.contract.lua" --generated-remotes generated/remotes --generated-tests generated/tests --sdk-require "../../src/Contracts"
scripts.test: npm run format:check && npm run test:luau && npm run test:host && npm run scan:ci && npm run analyze && npm run lint:selene && npm run verify:examples
